entryType: direct entry into open living space with immediate access to all areas
kitchenLocation: centrally located along right wall, adjacent to dining area and with easy access to living room
bedroomLayout: single bedroom positioned in upper right corner for privacy, separated from main living areas
bathroomPlacement: single full bathroom in upper left corner with adjacent walk-in closet, convenient to bedroom but also accessible from main living areas
efficiencyNotes: open concept living/dining/kitchen maximizes perceived space
centralized plumbing with bathroom and laundry in same area
angled transitions between spaces optimize flow
multi-functional dining area serves as transition between kitchen and living
dimensionNotes: compact 22'-5" square footprint with efficient room proportions - bedroom approximately 10'x11', open living area spans most of the lower portion, bathroom and closet areas appropriately sized for function without excess space
uniqueFeatures: angled wall transitions create visual interest and optimize space usage
walk-in closet (W.I.C.) provides significant storage in small footprint
separate pantry adds valuable kitchen storage
dishwasher integrated into compact kitchen design
dual TV locations in bedroom and living room
circulationEfficiency: minimal hallway space with most circulation through functional areas, maximizing usable square footage
